name: Hazelcast IMDG Enterprise for PCF
shortDescription: Clickable Hazelcast IMDG Tile for Pivotal Cloud Foundry – the easiest way to deploy an open source Hazelcast cluster on Cloud Foundry.
longDescription: Clickable Hazelcast IMDG Tile for Pivotal Cloud Foundry – the easiest way to deploy an open source Hazelcast cluster on Cloud Foundry.
